1.name: Classic Beef Pho
1.materials: Rice noodles, beef brisket, star anise, cinnamon, ginger, onion, fish sauce
1.description: A traditional Vietnamese noodle soup with rich broth, slow-cooked for 6 hours.

2.name: Brown Sugar Bubble Tea
2.materials: Black tea, fresh milk, brown sugar syrup, tapioca pearls, ice
2.description: Creamy milk tea with chewy tapioca pearls and caramelized brown sugar.
